hero.badge: Built for Amazon sellers and brands
hero.title: Stop losing the Buy Box without knowing.
hero.subtitle: Track Buy Box ownership across every ASIN, get the exact reason you lost it, and see the revenue you're leaving on the table — in real time.
hero.tagline: No setup required. Connect your Seller Central or Vendor Central account in minutes.

features.title: Everything you need to defend the Buy Box
features.subtitle: Visibility, root-cause analysis, and alerts — purpose-built for the way Amazon really works.

visibility.title: Visibility tracking
visibility.description: Monitor Buy Box ownership across every ASIN on a schedule that fits your operation — hourly, daily, or real-time.

revenue.title: Revenue impact
revenue.description: Quantify the dollars you're losing every time the Buy Box flips. Turn an abstract problem into a concrete number your team can act on.

rootCause.title: Root-cause analysis
rootCause.description: Know exactly why you lost the Buy Box: cheaper third-party seller, MAP violation, internal SC vs VC cannibalization, or a price suppression.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.description: Email and Slack notifications when visibility drops below your thresholds — so you catch problems in hours, not weeks.

finalCta.title: Ready to stop losing sales to the Buy Box?
finalCta.subtitle: Connect your Amazon account and start tracking visibility in minutes.

overview.title: Buy Box Overview
overview.description: Visibility, missed sales, and trends across your tracked products

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure tracker schedule, scope, and notifications
